'''鈭歯-y-y''' ('''kanayay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unalter|unalter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unalter|unalter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-y-y
|-
! Lemma
| kanayay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinayay|thinayay]] || [[word:jinayay|jinayay]] || [[word:shinayay|shinayay]] || [[word:kinayay|kinayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunayay|thuthunayay]] || [[word:jujunayay|jujunayay]] || [[word:shushunayay|shushunayay]] || [[word:kukunayay|kukunayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunayay|thunayay]] || [[word:junayay|junayay]] || [[word:shunayay|shunayay]] || [[word:kunayay|kunayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunayay|thunayay]] || [[word:junayay|junayay]] || [[word:shunayay|shunayay]] || [[word:kunayay|kunayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenayay|thenayay]] || [[word:jenayay|jenayay]] || [[word:shenayay|shenayay]] || [[word:kenayay|kenayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonayay|thothonayay]] || [[word:jojonayay|jojonayay]] || [[word:shoshonayay|shoshonayay]] || [[word:kokonayay|kokonayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonayay|thonayay]] || [[word:jonayay|jonayay]] || [[word:shonayay|shonayay]] || [[word:konayay|konayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonayay|thonayay]] || [[word:jonayay|jonayay]] || [[word:shonayay|shonayay]] || [[word:konayay|konayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nayay|th忙nayay]] || [[word:j忙nayay|j忙nayay]] || [[word:sh忙nayay|sh忙nayay]] || [[word:k忙nayay|k忙nayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanayay|thathanayay]] || [[word:jajanayay|jajanayay]] || [[word:shashanayay|shashanayay]] || [[word:kakanayay|kakanayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanayay|thanayay]] || [[word:janayay|janayay]] || [[word:shanayay|shanayay]] || [[word:kanayay|kanayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanayay|thanayay]] || [[word:janayay|janayay]] || [[word:shanayay|shanayay]] || [[word:kanayay|kanayay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanayay|shanayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanayay|goshanayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanayay|gokishanayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanayayn眉|shanayayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanayaynkn眉|goshanayaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayayn眉|gokishanayayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanayaysh毛|shanayaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanayaynksh毛|goshanayaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanayaysh毛|gokishanayaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayayro|shanayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayaynkro|goshanayaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayayro|gokishanayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayaymu|shanayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayaynkmu|goshanayaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayaymu|gokishanayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanayaysher|shanayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanayaynksher|goshanayaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanayaysher|gokishanayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanayayng|shanayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanayaynkng|goshanayaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanayayng|gokishanayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanayaya|shanayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanayaynkya|goshanayaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanayaya|gokishanayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanayayam|shanayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanayaynkyam|goshanayaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanayayam|gokishanayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayayn眉sh毛|shanayayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayaynkn眉sh毛|goshanayaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayayn眉sh毛|gokishanayayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayayn眉ro|shanayayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayaynkn眉ro|goshanayaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayayn眉ro|gokishanayayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayayn眉mu|shanayayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayaynkn眉mu|goshanayaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayayn眉mu|gokishanayayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayaysh毛n眉|shanayaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayaynksh毛n眉|goshanayaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayaysh毛n眉|gokishanayaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayaysh毛ro|shanayaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayaynksh毛ro|goshanayaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayaysh毛ro|gokishanayaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayaysh毛mu|shanayaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayaynksh毛mu|goshanayaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayaysh毛mu|gokishanayaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayayron眉|shanayayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayaynkron眉|goshanayaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayayron眉|gokishanayayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayayrosh毛|shanayayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayaynkrosh毛|goshanayaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayayrosh毛|gokishanayayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayayromu|shanayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayaynkromu|goshanayaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayayromu|gokishanayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayaymun眉|shanayaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayaynkmun眉|goshanayaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayaymun眉|gokishanayaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayaymush毛|shanayaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayaynkmush毛|goshanayaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayaymush毛|gokishanayaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayaymuro|shanayaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayaynkmuro|goshanayaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayaymuro|gokishanayaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
